use_cases: Showcasing photography portfolios with immersive 3D scroll navigation
Displaying product galleries with depth-based blur and fade transitions
Creating visual storytelling experiences with infinite scroll imagery
Building creative agency landing pages with animated image planes
ai_summary: An immersive 3D gallery component that renders images as floating planes in a Three.js scene with depth-based fade and blur effects. Users scroll to navigate through an infinite loop of images that smoothly transition with parallax-like depth perception. Features configurable fade-in/out zones, blur intensity falloff, and smooth animations at 60fps.
